description_long: This temple features a prominent, steeply sloped stone roof with a textured, weathered appearance, topped by a small ornamental finial. The structure sits on a raised stone platform with steps leading up to the entrance, which is flanked by two square columns. The main body of the temple is compact and rectangular, with dark stone walls and a recessed entryway that appears to be partially enclosed by wooden or dark-colored panels. The roof overhangs significantly, providing shelter to the entrance and the surrounding platform. Minimal decorative elements are visible, with the design focusing on geometric simplicity and solid construction. The overall aesthetic is austere, with a focus on stonework and functional form.
description: A compact stone temple with a steep, textured roof, raised platform, and minimal ornamentation. The structure emphasizes geometric lines and solid stone construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with steps, two square columns, and the overhanging stone roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the roof overhang and the solid stone platform beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back wall and the full width of the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the platform steps and the recessed entryway partially visible.
attribute_ornamentation: minimalist, sparse geometric detailing, small roof finial
attribute_entrance_design: Rectangular entry with steps, flanked by two square columns, partially recessed and minimally ornamented.
